notes:
Today marks an important milestone for Keysight: the new Keysight.com product experience is now live. 

This launch is a major step forward in how we show up to the world—bringing our brand, our portfolio, and our customer experience together in a way that is simpler, clearer, and built for how customers buy today. It reflects years of effort and deep cross-functional collaboration, with contributions from more than 1,000 team members across Keysight.

As you’ve seen from the pre-announcements this week, at the core of the new experience is a more intuitive way for customers to discover, compare, configure, and buy. The redesigned site features a significantly simplified portfolio structure, streamlined navigation, and a modern look and feel that makes it easier to do business with Keysight while preserving the technical rigor and configurability our customers expect.
